title: eurybia erubescens
intro: Eurybia erubescens, also known as the scarlet rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. Some reported health benefits of Eurybia erubescens include relief from arthritis, improved wound healing, and reduced risk of certain infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
